---
title: "Home"
---

# Ana Pineda

Welcome! I’m **Ana Pineda**, a Data Analytics major interested in **image analysis and biological applications**.

## What you’ll find here
- A few projects I’m proud of
- The tools I use (R, Python, SQL, Tableau/Power BI, Excel)
- Ways to contact me:

::: callout-note
**Tip:** This site is built with Quarto. It’s designed to be reproducible and easy to update as your work evolves.
:::

## Quick highlights
- **Skills:** R, tidyverse, SQL, data visualization, statistical modeling  
- **Interests:** (add 2–3)  
- **Currently seeking:** research and full-time roles 

## Contact
- Email: anavpineda1@gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/anavpineda  
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/anavpineda/
